property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

testcase.name: AdminUserDetail should create
AdminUserDetail should initialise model with empty values for a new user
AdminUserDetail should have peopleSelectEnabled false on init until a household is selected
AdminUserDetail should expose houseId and peopleId fields on the signal form
AdminUserDetail displayHousehold — positive: returns the household name
AdminUserDetail displayHousehold — negative: returns empty string for null
AdminUserDetail displayHousehold — negative: returns empty string when name is undefined
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSearchInput — positive: updates householdSearchText signal
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSearchInput — negative: clears houseId in model
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSearchInput — negative: clears peopleId and disables the select
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSearchInput — negative: clears peopleOptions
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSelected — positive: sets houseId in model
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSelected — positive: marks the form as dirty
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSelected — positive: updates householdSearchText to the name
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSelected — positive: loads people for the selected household
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSelected — negative: household with no name sets search text to empty
AdminUserDetail filteredHouseholds — positive: calls searchByName after 300 ms debounce for ≥2 chars
AdminUserDetail filteredHouseholds — negative: does not call searchByName for < 2 chars
AdminUserDetail filteredHouseholds — negative: returns empty array on HTTP error
AdminUserDetail filteredHouseholds — debounce: only calls API once for rapid keystrokes
AdminUserDetail loadPeopleForHousehold — positive: sorts people by last name then first name
AdminUserDetail loadPeopleForHousehold — positive: enables peopleSelectEnabled after load
AdminUserDetail loadPeopleForHousehold — negative: clears peopleOptions on error
AdminUserDetail showHouseholdDropdown — true when userId is 0 and no householdName
AdminUserDetail showHouseholdDropdown — false when householdName is set
AdminUserDetail showHouseholdDropdown — false when editing an existing user (userId > 0)
